attributes.title: logstash-*
attributes.name: logstash
attributes.runtimeFieldMap: {"correlation.origin":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"def appName = ''; if (doc.containsKey('application_name.keyword') && doc['application_name.keyword'].size() > 0) { appName = doc['application_name.keyword'].value; } if (appName.length() > 0) { def m = /^(exercises-[^;]+);req=(.+)$/.matcher(appName); if (m.find()) { emit(m.group(1)); } }"}},"correlation.request_id":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"def appName = ''; if (doc.containsKey('application_name.keyword') && doc['application_name.keyword'].size() > 0) { appName = doc['application_name.keyword'].value; } if (appName.length() > 0) { def m = /^(exercises-[^;]+);req=(.+)$/.matcher(appName); if (m.find()) { emit(m.group(2)); } }"}},"sql.op":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"if (doc.containsKey('ps.keyword') && doc['ps.keyword'].size() > 0) { def ps = doc['ps.keyword'].value.toUpperCase(); if (ps.equals('SELECT') || ps.equals('INSERT') || ps.equals('UPDATE') || ps.equals('DELETE')) { emit(ps); } } if (doc.containsKey('message.keyword') && doc['message.keyword'].size() > 0) { def m = /(?i)\\b(SELECT|INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE)\\b/.matcher(doc['message.keyword'].value); if (m.find()) { emit(m.group(1).toUpperCase()); } }"}},"url_params.name":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"if (doc.containsKey('url_param_name.keyword') && doc['url_param_name.keyword'].size() > 0) { emit(doc['url_param_name.keyword'].value); } else if (doc.containsKey('url_params.keyword') && doc['url_params.keyword'].size() > 0) { def raw = doc['url_params.keyword'].value; def key = '\"name\":\"'; def start = raw.indexOf(key); if (start >= 0) { def from = start + key.length(); def end = raw.indexOf('\"', from); if (end > from) { emit(raw.substring(from, end)); } } }"}},"url_params.email":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"if (doc.containsKey('url_param_email.keyword') && doc['url_param_email.keyword'].size() > 0) { emit(doc['url_param_email.keyword'].value); } else if (doc.containsKey('url_params.keyword') && doc['url_params.keyword'].size() > 0) { def raw = doc['url_params.keyword'].value; def key = '\"email\":\"'; def start = raw.indexOf(key); if (start >= 0) { def from = start + key.length(); def end = raw.indexOf('\"', from); if (end > from) { emit(raw.substring(from, end)); } } }"}},"log.body":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"if (doc.containsKey('body.keyword') && doc['body.keyword'].size() > 0) { def b = doc['body.keyword'].value; if (b.length() > 0 && !b.equals('{}')) { emit(b); } else if (doc.containsKey('message.keyword') && doc['message.keyword'].size() > 0) { emit(doc['message.keyword'].value); } } else if (doc.containsKey('message.keyword') && doc['message.keyword'].size() > 0) { emit(doc['message.keyword'].value); }"}}}

attributes.title: HTTP — recent requests
attributes.description: App HTTP access logs (health/metrics noise excluded). Matches Grafana Recent HTTP requests.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"_exists_: status and service: (exercises-java or exercises-python or exercises-rust or exercises-react-node) and not (status: 200 and (path: \"/health\" or path: \"/api/health\" or path: \"/metrics\" or path: \"/actuator/prometheus\" or path: \"/api/observability/health\"))","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: PostgreSQL — SQL CRUD by origin
attributes.description: Stamped Postgres statements (application_name exercises-*;req=...). Click correlation.request_id to open HTTP handler logs.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"service: exercises-postgres and application_name: *exercises* and (ps: (SELECT or INSERT or UPDATE or DELETE) or message: *statement*) and not message: *SELECT 1* and not message: duration*","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: PostgreSQL — log stream
attributes.description: Postgres JSON logs with startup noise and duration-only lines filtered out.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"service: exercises-postgres and not message: duration* and not message: (*Skipping* or *redirecting* or *Future* or *ending*log*output* or *stderr* or *received*fast*shutdown* or *aborting*active*transactions* or *database*system*shut*down* or *shutting*down* or *starting*PostgreSQL*)","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: All logs for request (correlate)
attributes.description: Java relay, Rust API, HTTP access, and Postgres SQL for one request_id (click correlation.request_id in SQL CRUD).

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"(service: (exercises-java or exercises-rust or exercises-python or exercises-react-node or exercises-postgres)) and (_exists_: request_id or _exists_: application_name) and not (service: exercises-postgres and message: duration*)","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: By session or request ID
attributes.description: Correlate logs by request_id or session_id. Filter in the search bar: request_id: "<uuid>" or session_id: "<id>". log.body shows the HTTP body when present, otherwise the log message.

attributes.title: Log pipeline — all services
attributes.description: All logs shipped through Filebeat → Logstash

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"level: (error OR warn) OR message: *error* OR message: *failed*","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: Exercises — HTTP & Postgres logs
attributes.description: Correlate HTTP requests with Postgres SQL. Uses the logstash-* data view. Click correlation.request_id in the SQL panel to drill into one request.

attributes.title: Exercises — Log pipeline (Kibana)
attributes.description: Ingest health for Filebeat → Logstash → Elasticsearch (logstash-* data view).
